person.name: Simon Echyngham
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Simon was the heir of his brother William who died young and without heirs. Simon was listed as brother of William and son of Simon in the records.

Simon was Sheriff of Surrey and Sussex in 1234-6.

Simon was listed as age 35 when his brother died in 1253 so born about 1218.

He died before 1268, when William is described as his son and heir in a grant of free warren.

«b»Children
Simon Echyngham and Paulina had the following children:«/b»
1.) WILLIAM ECHYNGHAM. He died on 11 May 1294. He married Katherine.

2.) ROBERT ECHYNGHAM was born about 1248. He married Margery St Leger, daughter of William St Leger de Sowkerness and Christina before 1293.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Echyngham於大約1218年出生在英國素可迪胡爾斯特時，他的父親Simon Echingham Sr.34歲，母親Alice FitzReinfred25歲。他和Paulina St Leger至少有4個兒子。他去世於1268年之前在英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Echyngham was born about 1218, in Ticehurst, Sussex, England, his father, Simon Echingham Sr., was 34 and his mother, Alice FitzReinfred, was 25. He had at least 4 sons with Paulina St Leger. He died before 1268, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Echyngham est né environ 1218, à Ticehurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Simon Echingham Sr., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzReinfred, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Paulina St Leger. Il est décédé avant 1268, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Echyngham um 1218 in Ticehurst, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Echingham Sr. 34 und seine Mutter Alice FitzReinfred 25. Er hatte mit Paulina St Leger mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb vor 1268 in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Echyngham è nato il circa 1218 nel Ticehurst, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Simon Echingham Sr., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzReinfred, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Paulina St Leger. Morì prima del 1268, nel Etchingham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Echynghamが約1218年にイギリススセックスティセハルストで生まれた時，父Simon Echingham Sr.は34歳，母Alice FitzReinfredは25歳であった。彼はPaulina St Legerとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1268年以前にイギリスイギリススセックスエトチンガムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Echyngham(이)가 대략 1218년 영국 수세스 티스후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Echingham Sr.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzReinfred(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Paulina St Leger(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1268년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트친그함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Echyngham nasceu aproximadamente 1218, em Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Echingham Sr., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzReinfred, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Paulina St Leger. Ele faleceu antes 1268, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Echyngham родился около 1218 г. в местности таисэурст, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon Echingham Sr. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzReinfred, 25. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Paulina St Leger. Он умер перед 1268 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Echyngham nació aproximadamente 1218, en Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon Echingham Sr., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice FitzReinfred, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Paulina St Leger. Murió antes de 1268, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
